# Aitotech — llms.txt

> AitoTech is an AI company in Delhi, India.
> Routely is our AI coding tool — smart model routing, browser + desktop, git, and persistent memory.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in

## Product: Routely
- URL: https://aitotech.in/routely
- Try in browser: https://app.routely.aitotech.in
- What: AI coding tool — picks the best free model per task, understands codebase, remembers chat, agent workflows
- Demo: https://aitotech.in/routely/demo?tour=1
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/routely#waitlist
- Docs: https://aitotech.in/docs

## Key features (Phase 1 — coding only)
- Smart model routing (OpenRouter free models — user never picks a model)
- Browser IDE (try online) + desktop download (local git)
- Persistent chat memory per project
- Agent workflows — fix code, git pull/push, multitask jobs

## FAQ
- Q: What is Routely?
  A: AitoTech's AI coding tool. Describe tasks in plain English; Routely routes to the best free model and writes or fixes code.
- Q: Do I choose an AI model?
  A: No. Routely picks automatically for each task (debug, build, git, refactor).
- Q: Is it only for coding?
  A: Yes for now. General assistant features come later.
